statement: In every magma, Equation 2215 (`x = ((y * z) * w) * (x * w)`) implies Equation 443 (`x = x * (y * (y * (z * y)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0471
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) w) (op x w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op y (op y (op z y))))
